secondary_binaries: AMD FidelityFX stack (denoiser, frame-gen, upscaler, loader)
dxcompiler.dll, dxil.dll, expat.dll, gvc.dll, libpng18.dll, libzstd.dll, ngfx_injection.dll (NVIDIA), libxell.dll, cdt.dll, cgraph.dll, boost_system/thread-vc140-mt-x64-1_68.dll
protection_class: encrypted-vm-handler-table-dispatch (Pattern A-VMT canonical - new pattern from v2.9.0 stress test)
hypervisor_posture: kernel-active (201 CPUID leaves, 136 VMX-EPT hits, 2390 RDTSC, 0 registry, 1 SMBIOS/ACPI)
notes: Crimson Desert is the canonical Pattern A-VMT case (encrypted-VM handler-table dispatch - NOT a bytecode interpreter). The .arch section is 73.7MB (largest section), .rodata is 300.8MB (massive - holds the encrypted metadata region). Two-regime .xcode layout: low-entropy dispatch table (head entropy 3.225) + high-entropy encrypted metadata (entropy 7.2). The .srdata section is 2.7MB with entropy 0 (statically-decrypted BSS). Statically-linked OpenSSL (libeay32.dll, 2MB) provides AES-NI / SHA-512 / VPAES. Hermes SDK core wrapper (4MB) for telemetry. librdkafka (3.6MB) is a real streaming-pipeline client - confirmed telemetry surface. POGO + ILTCG entries present - matches the v2.9.0 stress test finding.
